---
title: "Mastermind Trivia"
format: 
  revealjs:
    transition: slide
    background-transition: fade
    theme: solarized
css: styles.css
---

# About this quiz

These questions will start easy and get harder--so watch out! Everyone will play against the mastermind on their given topic.

## About the questions {.smaller}

Below are the types of questions you'll see:

1. Multiple-choice
    - The easiest question to get yourself situated
2. Open
    - It gets a little harder when you don't have options anymore
3. Ranking
    - Can you put them in the right order?

---

## About the questions, cont'd {.smaller}

4. Sound-bite
    - I'll play a sound clip and you'll have to answer the question related to it
5. Range
    - Unlike the other questions so far, whoever is closest will get this point
6. Who/What am I?
    - You'll get 3 clues, if you can get the person/object on the first clue that'll be worth 3 points, 2 for the second clue, and 1 for the last clue--pending you get the right answer

## About the scoring

We'll calculate the differentials between the mastermind and the rest of the team--whoever has the highest differential wins.

However, if there is a tie I have some volleyball trivia questions to break it.

# Alex: Veep {.content-background background-image="./static/veep_background.jpg" style="padding-left:40px;padding-top:5px;padding-bottom:5px;border:2px solid #002b36"}

## Question 1

::: footer
Alex - Veep
:::

Julia Louis-Dreyfus won the Primetime Emmy for Outstanding Lead Actress in a Comedy Series due to her performance in each of the first 6 seasons of Veep. She was nominated for the 7th season but lost to whom?

a. Catherine O'Hara for Schitt's Creek as Moira Rose
b. Phoebe Waller-Bridge for Fleabag
c. Natasha Lyonne for Russian Doll as Nadia
d. Christina Applegate for Dead to Me as Jen

---

The correct answer is:

Phoebe Waller-Bridge for Fleabag

## Question 2

::: footer
Alex - Veep
:::

What does Vice President Selina Meyer wear in the first scene of every first episode of each season?

---

The correct answer is:

A red dress

## Question 3

::: footer
Alex - Veep
:::

List these guests in chronological order of appearance.

- Patton Oswalt as Teddy Sykes
- Rhea Seehorn as Michelle York
- Hugh Laurie as Tom James
- Christopher Meloni as Ray Whelans
- Clea DuVall as Majorie Palmiotti

---

The correct answer is:

- Christopher Meloni (S3E6)
- Patton Oswalt (S4E1)
- Hugh Laurie (S4E5)
- Clea DuVall (S5E1)
- Rhea Seehorn (S7E2)

## Question 4

::: footer
Alex - Veep
:::

What is Selina Meyer referring to in this clip?

<!-- https://youtu.be/YtRVGdT6c3E?t=116 -->

---

The correct answer is:

Catherine's hair

## Question 5

::: footer
Alex - Veep
:::

Throughout the entire series, how many days did Selina Meyer serve as president?

---

The correct answer is:

1825

## Question 6

::: footer
Alex - Veep
:::

Who/what am I?

::: {.incremental}
- Fact 1
- Fact 2
- Fact 3
:::

---

The correct answer is:

The Leviathan (Gary's bag)

# Michael: Yacht Rock  {.content-background background-image="./static/yacht_rock_background.jpg" style="padding-left:40px;padding-top:5px;padding-bottom:5px;border:2px solid #002b36"}

## Question 1

::: footer
Michael - Yacht Rock
:::

Who coined the term 'Yacht Rock'?

a. John Oates
b. J.D. Ryznar
c. Jimmy Buffet
d. Brian Wilson

---

The correct answer is:

b. J.D. Ryznar

## Question 2

::: footer
Michael - Yacht Rock
:::

Who wrote the anthemic, archetypical 1979 Yacht Rock song 'Sailing'?

---

The correct answer is:

Christopher Cross

## Question 3

::: footer
Michael - Yacht Rock
:::

List these Beach Boys albums in chronological order of release

a. Smiley Smile
b. Pet Sounds
c. Still Cruisin'
d. All Summer Long
e. Surfin' U.S.A.

---

The correct answer is:

e. Surfin' U.S.A. (1963)
d. All Summer Long (1964)
b. Pet Sounds (1966)
a. Smiley Smile (1967)
c. Still Cruisin' (1989)

## Question 4

::: footer
Michael - Yacht Rock
:::

Name each of these songs and their artists.

<!-- https://open.spotify.com/playlist/4t6ZbMpxbuFaWGm8994Rcl?si=404500b57c074e24&pt=353e30145a5f482844f021f4fc751e3d -->

---

The correct answer is:

1. Footloose by Kenny Loggins
2. Hold the Line by Toto
3. The Chain by Fleetwood Max
4. Cold as Ice by Foreigner
5. The Joker by Steve Miller Band

## Question 5

::: footer
Michael - Yacht Rock
:::

How many members were in the most recent touring lineup of Steely Dan?

---

The correct answer is:

13

## Question 6

::: footer
Michael - Yacht Rock
:::

What band am I?

::: {.incremental}
- I composed (most of the) soundtrack for the 1984 movie Dune
- I was formed by David Paich and Jeff Porcaro in 1977
- As I've said many times, "It's going to take a lot to drag me away from you"
:::

---

The correct answer is:

Toto

# Tyler: One Piece  {.content-background background-image="./static/one_piece_background.jpg" style="padding-left:40px;padding-top:5px;padding-bottom:5px;border:2px solid #002b36"}

## Question 1

::: footer
Tyler - One Piece
:::

The first video game based on the One Piece franchise is strategy game Pirate King, released in Japan in 2000. On which console was this game released?

a. WonderSwan
b. Game Boy Color
c. PlayStation 1
d. GameCube

---

The correct answer is:

a. WonderSwan

## Question 2

::: footer
Tyler - One Piece
:::

What is the name of the fruit that Luffy eats, granting his body the properties of rubber?

---

The correct answer is:

Hito Hito no Mi, Model: Nika (will accept Human-Human Fruit, Gomu Gomu no Mi or Gum-Gum fruit)

## Question 3

::: footer
Tyler - One Piece
:::

Sort the following Straw Hat members based on their first bounties (high to low)

a. Nami
b. Sanji
c. Chopper
d. Roronoa Zoro
e. Usopp

---

The correct answer is:

b. Sanji (77,000,000)
d. Roronoa Zoro (60,000,000)
e. Usopp (30,000,000)
a. Nami (16,000,000)
c. Chopper (50)


## Question 4

::: footer
Tyler - One Piece
:::

In this scene, what item is Luffy making from scratch to aid him in his fight?

<!-- https://youtu.be/REXhLXvN-bE?t=15 -->

---

The correct answer is:

Baseball bat

## Question 5

::: footer
Tyler - One Piece
:::

The manga series holds the Guinness World Record for the 'Most copies published for the same comic book series by a single author' (July 2022). How many copies have been published?

---

The correct answer is:

416,566,000

## Question 6

::: footer
Tyler - One Piece
:::

Who/what am I?

::: {.incremental}
- Fact 1
- Fact 2
- Fact 3
:::

---

The correct answer is:

Answer

# Thanks for playing!

<!-- Still need:

Veep:
- 6. Who/what am I?

One Piece:
- 6. Who/what am I? -->
